name: Roasted Butternut Squash Soup (Spruce)
recipeIngredient: 2 small butternut squash, halved and seeded
salt and black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush each squash half with 1 tablespoon honey. Roast at 350 degrees until tender, about 45 minutes; cool. Remove flesh from skin.
2. In a saucepan over low heat, sauté shallots in butter until translucent. Add squash and 3 quarts stock. Bring to boil.
3. Reduce heat. Add rosemary. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Transfer to a blender and puree. Add remaining stock. Blend well. Season to taste with salt, pepper and additional honey. Soup should be brothy.
